texts: Welcome to the team workspace! Please keep discussions professional.
Reminder: company all-hands meeting this Friday at 3pm.
Thanks! Looking forward to the all-hands.
Does anyone know if the Q1 report is finalized?
Yes, Q1 report was submitted yesterday. Check the Documents folder on ownCloud.
I've pushed the new API refactor to the feature/api-v2 branch. Please review when you get a chance.
Also, we need to decide on the caching strategy before the next sprint.
I'll review the PR today. For caching, I suggest we go with Redis — it's already in our stack.
BTW the CI pipeline is failing on the main branch. Looks like a flaky test.
Q4 performance reviews are complete. Summary uploaded to ownCloud under HR-Confidential.
Salary adjustment proposals for 2026 are due by end of month.
I've drafted the salary bands document. Will share it in the next HR meeting.
Note: Frank's PIP documentation needs to be finalized before Friday.
Project Alpha kickoff is scheduled for next Monday. Please review the requirements doc.
We need to finalize the tech stack by Wednesday.
I've prepared the architecture diagram. Will present during kickoff.
Estimated timeline: 3 months for MVP, 6 months for full release.
INCIDENT-2026-001: Database connection pool exhaustion at 2am. Auto-recovered after scaling.
Root cause: Missing connection timeout config. Fix deployed.
INCIDENT-2026-002: API latency spike during peak hours. Investigating cache miss rates.
Lunch poll: should we order noodles or sandwiches for Friday?
Reminder: old memes channel was merged here last month.
Hi Alice, please send me the final Q1 launch checklist when you have a minute.
Also confirm whether the engineering review is still scheduled for Thursday.
Bob, can you summarize the latest incident follow-up items in one message?
Please include the cache timeout change and DB pool alert thresholds.

threaded_messages.root_text: Thread kickoff: please summarize the API v2 rollout blockers here.
replies: Primary blocker is the flaky CI suite on macOS runners.
Secondary blocker is missing cache invalidation metrics on the staging environment.

threaded_messages.root_text: Thread kickoff: capture postmortem follow-up items for INCIDENT-2026-001.
replies: Action item 1: add DB pool saturation alert at 80 percent usage.
Action item 2: document the new timeout setting in the runbook.
